---
title: "What I'm Reading"
subtitle: "Goodreads Update"
date: "2024-12-02"
format: 
  html: 
    code-line-numbers: false
categories:
  - Update
  - R
  - Ranking
draft: true
---

Automated look from goodreads of what I'm reading/been reading

# Imports

```{r imports}

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(
  "tidyverse",
  "httr2",
  "rvest",
  "janitor",
  "gt"
)
set.seed(8675309)

```

# Scraping Prep

```{r scraping prep}

user_guid <- 98547221

base <- "https://www.goodreads.com/"

recent <- list(path = c("review", "list", user_guid), query = list(shelf = "read", sort = "date_read"))
year_in_books <- c("user", "year_in_books", format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"), user_guid)

```

# Recent

```{r}

# convert the above mapping to a function to use in gt that can be vectorized
num_to_star <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) {
    return("Not Rated")
  } else {
    stars <- rep("&#9733;", floor(x))
    if (x %% 1 >= 0.5) {
      stars <- c(stars, "&#9734;")
    }
    stars <- c(stars, rep("&#9734;", 5 - length(stars)))
    return(paste0(stars, collapse = ""))
  }
}

generate_book_svg <- function(pages, max_pages, cover_color) {

  # Set cover thickness (pixels)
  cover_thickness <- 6
  
  # Map pages to a reasonable height
  height <- cover_thickness * 2 + (pages / max_pages) * 60
  
  # Construct the final SVG with updated dimensions
  svg_string <- paste0(
    '<svg width="250" height="', height, '" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">',
    '  ',
    '  <rect x="0" y="0" width="10" height="', height, '" fill="', cover_color, '" rx="5" ry="5" />',
    '  ',
    '  <rect x="0" y="0" width="245" height="', cover_thickness, '" fill="', cover_color, '" rx="5" ry="5" />',
    '  ',
    '  <rect x="10" y="', cover_thickness, '" width="235" height="', height - (cover_thickness * 2), '" fill="#F5F5DC" />',
    '  ',
    '  <rect x="0" y="', height - cover_thickness, '" width="245" height="', cover_thickness, '" fill="', cover_color, '" rx="5" ry="5" />',
    '</svg>'
  )
  
  return(svg_string)
}

```

```{r}

request(base) %>% 
  req_url_path_append(recent$path) %>% 
  req_url_query(!!!recent$query) %>% 
  req_perform() -> raw_user

raw_user %>% 
  resp_body_html() %>% 
  html_element(css = '#books') %>%
  html_table() -> last_20_tbl

raw_user %>% 
  resp_body_html() %>%
  html_elements(css = ".field.cover") %>% 
  html_element("img") %>%
  html_attr("src") %>%
  na.omit() -> covers

rating_lookup <- c(
  "did not like it" = 1,
  "it was ok" = 2,
  "liked it" = 3,
  "really liked it" = 4,
  "it was amazing" = 5
)

last_20_tbl %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  select(
    title,
    author,
    pages,
    my_rating = rating_2,
    pub_rating = rating,
    pub_num_ratings = ratings,
    read = started
  ) %>% 
    mutate(
      title = str_trim(str_remove_all(title, "title")),
      title = str_replace_all(title, "\\n", "<br/>"),
      author = str_squish(str_remove_all(author, "author|\\*")),
      author = case_when(
        str_detect(author, ",") ~ str_replace(author, "(.*), (.*)", "\\2 \\1"),
        TRUE ~ author
      ),
      across(c(pages, pub_rating, pub_num_ratings), parse_number),
      my_rating = map_chr(str_split(my_rating, pattern = "\n"), ~ str_squish(.x[2])),
      my_rating = case_match(my_rating, "not rated" ~ NA_integer_, .default = rating_lookup[my_rating]), 
      # if multiple, most recent is first so we take that one
      read = mdy(str_extract(read, "\\w{3} \\d{2}, \\d{4}")),
      cover = covers
    ) %>% 
      relocate(cover) %>%
      arrange(desc(read)) -> clean_recent

# max pages for svg scaling
max_pages <- max(clean_recent$pages, na.rm = T)

# convert ratings to fractional stars based on float
clean_recent %>%
  mutate(across(c(pub_rating, my_rating), ~ map_chr(.x, num_to_star))) %>% 
  
  gt() %>% 

  # col fmts
  fmt_markdown(columns = c(title, pub_rating, my_rating)) %>%
  fmt_number(pub_num_ratings, decimals = 1, drop_trailing_zeros = T, suffixing = T) %>%
  fmt_date(read, date_style = "yMd") %>%
  
  # col transforms
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(cover),
    fn = \(x) web_image(url = x, height = px(80))
  ) %>% 
  text_transform(
    locations = cells_body(pages),
    fn = function(x) {
      map_chr(clean_recent$pages, ~ {
        svg <- generate_book_svg(.x, max_pages, "#2E2D4D")
        paste0("<div style='text-align:center; font-size:80%;'>", .x, " pages</div>", svg)
      })
    }
  ) %>% 

  # col merge
  cols_merge(
    columns = c(pub_rating, pub_num_ratings),
    pattern = "{1} <br/> <span style='font-size:80%; color:gray;'>{2} rating(s)</span>"
  ) %>% 

  # center align everything except title and author
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(cover, pages, my_rating, pub_rating, read)
  ) %>%

  # fix col widths
  cols_width(
    cover ~ px(100),
    title ~ px(300),
    author ~ px(200),
    pages ~ px(150),
    my_rating ~ px(150),
    pub_rating ~ px(150),
    read ~ px(150)
  ) %>%
  
  # labels
  cols_label(
    cover = "",
    title = "Title",
    author = "Author",
    pages = "Length",
    my_rating = "My Rating",
    pub_rating = "Avg. Rating",
    read = "Date Read"
  ) %>% 

  # tab opts
  tab_options(
    table.width = px(1100),
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    table.font.names = "Arial, sans-serif",
    table.font.size = 16,
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    table.border.top.style = "hidden",
    table.border.bottom.style = "hidden",
    column_labels.border.top.style = "hidden",
  ) -> recent_books_gt

```

# Year in Books

```{r}

# parse shortest and longest
parse_lockup <- function(nodeset) {

  # shortest/longest list
  shortest_longest <- list()

  # most/least shelved list
  most_least_shelved <- list()

  # nodes for shortest/longest
  nodeset %>% 
    resp_body_html() %>% 
    html_element(css = '#bodycontainer > div.mainContentContainer > div.mainContent > div.mainContentFloat > div.js-readingYear > div > div.readingYearContent > div.js-lazyGlideContainer > div.longestShortestBookWidget > div.yyibBooksLockup') %>% 
    html_children() -> shortest_longest$nodes

  nodeset %>% 
    resp_body_html() %>% 
    html_element(css = '#bodycontainer > div.mainContentContainer > div.mainContent > div.mainContentFloat > div.js-readingYear > div > div.readingYearContent > div.js-lazyGlideContainer > div.yyibBooksLockup') %>% 
    html_children() -> most_least_shelved$nodes

  # get cover image links
  shortest_longest$nodes %>% 
    html_element("img") %>%
    html_attr("src") -> shortest_longest$covers

  # get href from each
  shortest_longest$nodes %>%
    html_element("a") %>%
    html_attr("href") -> shortest_longest$links

  # get page counts from each
  shortest_longest$nodes %>%
    html_text() %>%
    str_extract("[\\d,]+\\s*pages") %>%
    parse_number() -> shortest_longest$pages

  # get cover image links
  most_least_shelved$nodes %>% 
    html_element("img") %>%
    html_attr("src") -> most_least_shelved$covers

  # get href from each
  most_least_shelved$nodes %>%
    html_element("a") %>%
    html_attr("href") -> most_least_shelved$links

  # get shelf count from each
  most_least_shelved$nodes %>%
    html_text() %>%
    str_extract("[\\d,]+\\s*") %>%
    parse_number() -> most_least_shelved$shelves

  # clear nodes
  shortest_longest$nodes <- NULL
  most_least_shelved$nodes <- NULL

  return(list(shortest_longest, most_least_shelved))

}

parse_all_books <- function(nodeset) {

  all_books <- list()

  nodeset %>% 
    resp_body_html() %>% 
    html_elements(css = '#bodycontainer > div.mainContentContainer > div.mainContent > div.mainContentFloat > div.js-readingYear > div > div.readingYearContent > div.js-lazyGlideContainer > div.coverView > div > div > div.bookCovers') %>% 
    html_elements("span") -> all_books$nodes

  # get cover image links
  all_books$nodes %>% 
    html_element("img") %>%
    html_attr("src") %>% 
    na.omit() -> all_books$covers

  # get href from each
  all_books$nodes %>%
    html_element("a") %>%
    html_attr("href") %>% 
    na.omit() -> all_books$links

  # clear nodes
  all_books$nodes <- NULL

  return(all_books)

}

```

```{r}

request(base) %>% 
  req_url_path_append(year_in_books) %>% 
  req_perform() -> raw_yib

# c(pages read, books read)
raw_yib %>% 
  resp_body_html() %>% 
  html_elements(css = ".headerImageContainer__count") %>% 
  html_text() %>% 
  parse_number()

# parse lockup sections
yib_parsed <- parse_lockup(raw_yib)
yib_parsed[1] -> shortest_longest
yib_parsed[2] -> most_least_shelved

# parse avg book length
raw_yib %>% 
  resp_body_html() %>% 
  html_element(css = '.yyibAverageLength') %>%
  html_text() %>% 
  str_extract("[\\d,]+\\s*pages") %>% 
  parse_number()

# avg star rating
raw_yib %>% 
  resp_body_html() %>% 
  html_element(css = '#bodycontainer > div.mainContentContainer > div.mainContent > div.mainContentFloat > div.js-readingYear > div > div.readingYearContent > div.js-lazyGlideContainer > div.yyibAverageLength > div.yyibAverageRatingData > div:nth-child(1)') %>% 
  html_text() %>% 
  parse_number()


all_books <- parse_all_books(raw_yib)

tibble(cover = all_books$covers, link = all_books$links) %>% 
  mutate(
    link = paste0("https://www.goodreads.com", link),
    img = paste0("<a href='", link, "' target='_blank'><img src='", cover, "' height='100'></a>")
  ) %>% 
  pull(img) %>% 
  ojs_define(yib_books = .)

```

Here are all the books I've read (so far) this year - click on any book cover to go to its Goodreads page!

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  
  const imageNodes = yib_books.map(htmlString => {
    const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');
    tempDiv.innerHTML = htmlString;
    const aTag = tempDiv.querySelector('a');
    const imgTag = aTag.querySelector('img');
    
    return {
      link: aTag.href,
      url: imgTag.src,
      width: 110,
      height: parseInt(imgTag.getAttribute('height'))*1.5
    }
  })

  const width = 1000;
  const height = 1000;
  const svg = d3.create("svg")
      .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${width} ${height}`);

  const simulation = d3.forceSimulation(imageNodes)
      .force("center", d3.forceCenter(width / 2, height / 2))
      .force("collide", d3.forceCollide().radius(d => {
        return Math.max(d.width, d.height) / 2;
      }).strength(1))
      .alphaDecay(0.01)
      .on("tick", ticked);

  const node = svg.selectAll("a")
    .data(imageNodes)
    .join("a")
      .attr("href", d => d.link)
      .attr("target", "_blank")
      .attr("transform", d => `translate(${d.x - d.width / 2}, ${d.y - d.height / 2})`);

  node.append("image")
    .attr("href", d => d.url)
    .attr("width", d => d.width)
    .attr("height", d => d.height);

  function ticked() {
    node
      .attr("transform", d => `translate(${d.x - d.width / 2}, ${d.y - d.height / 2})`);
  }

  return svg.node()

}

```
